info.name: Paystack Refunds and Disputes API
info.description:
Process customer refunds and respond to chargeback disputes — including evidence upload, resolution, and dispute export workflows.

Contact Support:
 Name: Paystack Support
 Email: support@paystack.com

urlencoded.description:
Amount ( in kobo if currency is NGN, pesewas, if currency is GHS, and cents, if currency is ZAR ) to be refunded to the customer. 
Amount cannot be more than the original transaction amount
